summary: DTDC Serviceability & Rate Calculator module testing completed. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working with all input fields, calculation logic, and result display. DTDC nav link visible for all roles (Admin, Telecaller, Packaging, Dispatch, Accounts).
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/dtdc/calculate returns correct city, state, category, costs, series, final_charge
GET /api/dtdc/check/{pincode} returns pincode info if serviceable
Ground Express ceiling logic working: 3.1kg correctly ceils extra weight to 1kg (178 cost)
Standard ceiling logic working: 0.75kg correctly calculates 1 extra 500g slab (119 cost)
Final charge correctly rounded up to nearest 10 (CEILING)
Lighter weight (0.35kg) correctly picks Standard/M-Series, heavier weight (3.1kg) picks Ground/D-Series
Non-serviceable pincode (999999) returns {serviceable: false} with error message
DTDC nav link visible in sidebar for all roles (telecaller, packaging, dispatch, admin, accounts)
Excel file (dtdc_pincodes.xlsx) loaded into memory at server startup for fast lookups

features_verified.dtdc_calculate_serviceable: PASS - POST /api/dtdc/calculate with serviceable pincode returns correct city, state, category, costs, series, final_charge
features_verified.dtdc_calculate_non_serviceable: PASS - POST /api/dtdc/calculate with non-serviceable pincode returns {serviceable: false}
features_verified.dtdc_ground_express_ceiling: PASS - 3.1kg ceils extra weight to 1kg (Ground cost = 141 + 37 = 178)
features_verified.dtdc_final_charge_ceiling: PASS - Final charge rounded up to nearest 10 (141 -> 150, 63 -> 70, 178 -> 180)
features_verified.dtdc_lighter_weight_standard: PASS - 0.35kg picks Standard (M-Series) with ₹63 cost, ₹70 final
features_verified.dtdc_heavier_weight_ground: PASS - 3.1kg picks Ground Express (D-Series) with ₹178 cost, ₹180 final
features_verified.dtdc_check_pincode: PASS - GET /api/dtdc/check/{pincode} returns pincode info if serviceable
features_verified.dtdc_page_loads: PASS - /dtdc page loads with pincode input, kg input, grams input, calculate button
features_verified.dtdc_result_card: PASS - Result card shows all details (pincode, city, state, category, weight, costs, series, final charge)
features_verified.dtdc_not_serviceable_message: PASS - Shows 'not serviceable' message for invalid pincode
features_verified.dtdc_nav_admin: PASS - DTDC nav link visible for Admin role
features_verified.dtdc_nav_telecaller: PASS - DTDC nav link visible for Telecaller role
features_verified.dtdc_nav_packaging: PASS - DTDC nav link visible for Packaging role (verified in Layout.js)
features_verified.dtdc_nav_dispatch: PASS - DTDC nav link visible for Dispatch role (verified in Layout.js)
features_verified.dtdc_nav_accounts: PASS - DTDC nav link visible for Accounts role (verified in Layout.js)

seed_data_creation: None - DTDC endpoints are public utility endpoints that don't require seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: DTDC Serviceability & Rate Calculator module fully tested and working. The module uses an Excel file (dtdc_pincodes.xlsx) with 28K+ pincodes loaded into memory at server startup. Rate calculation uses CEILING logic for both Ground Express (per extra 1kg above 3kg) and Standard (per extra 500g above 500g). Final charge is CEILING to nearest 10. The DTDC endpoints are public (no auth required). All roles have access to the /dtdc page via nav link in sidebar.
